title: Energizing American Chicken Skillet
description: A quick and flavorful skillet recipe featuring chicken, bell peppers, onions, and potatoes, all cooked to perfection in a zesty American-inspired sauce.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and chili powder.
Heat the olive oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and diced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the bell peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Sprinkle the garlic powder over the top of the chicken and vegetables.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
